title: Radar 6 axes
description: Radar SVG sur 6 axes — 3 grilles hexagonales concentriques (rayons 60/40/20) + 6 axes + polygone de zone + 6 points.

axes.description: Nombre d'axes (figé à 6 dans le template hexagone)

values.description: Valeurs de 0 à 50 (rayon max). Ordre = haut, haut-droite, bas-droite, bas, bas-gauche, haut-gauche

render.svg:
<svg width="160" height="160" viewBox="0 0 160 160">
  <g transform="translate(80, 80)">
    <polygon class="radar-grid" points="0,-60 52,-30 52,30 0,60 -52,30 -52,-30" />
    <polygon class="radar-grid" points="0,-40 34.6,-20 34.6,20 0,40 -34.6,20 -34.6,-20" />
    <polygon class="radar-grid" points="0,-20 17.3,-10 17.3,10 0,20 -17.3,10 -17.3,-10" />
    <line class="radar-axis" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="-60" />
    <line class="radar-axis" x1="0" y1="0" x2="52" y2="-30" />
    <line class="radar-axis" x1="0" y1="0" x2="52" y2="30" />
    <line class="radar-axis" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="60" />
    <line class="radar-axis" x1="0" y1="0" x2="-52" y2="30" />
    <line class="radar-axis" x1="0" y1="0" x2="-52" y2="-30" />
    <polygon class="radar-area" points="{{polygonFromValues values}}" />
    {{#each pointsFromValues values as |p|}}
      <circle class="radar-point" cx="{{p.x}}" cy="{{p.y}}" r="3" />
    {{/each}}
  </g>
</svg>
